raw.message: スキマ時間で侵略にゃ！

hook.summary: Shows the game being played in various everyday waiting scenarios.
hook.visual_action: A hand-held phone displaying gameplay is superimposed over an office desk and then a silhouette of a crowd.
hook.text_overlay: リフレッシュ中に侵略再開！

scene_flow: Gameplay shown over an office desk background with the text 'Resume invasion while taking a break'.
Gameplay shown over a silhouette of a crowd with the text 'Resume invasion while waiting in line'.
Gameplay shown over a computer monitor displaying a live stream countdown with the text 'Resume invasion while waiting for a stream'.
Final title card featuring the game logo and the text 'Anytime, anywhere, resume invasion!'.
on_screen_text: リフレッシュ中に侵略再開！
行列の順番待ち中に侵略再開！
視聴待機中に侵略再開！
audience_proxy: Japanese mobile gamers looking for a casual game to play during short breaks or while waiting in daily life.
